expectations.text: Identifies removing 'processing' from UIBackgroundModes as the fix
expectations.evidence: Response explicitly says 'Remove the <string>processing</string> line entirely. If processing is the only entry, remove the entire UIBackgroundModes key'

expectations.text: Explains WHY removing it is correct (app doesn't use BGTaskScheduler)
expectations.evidence: Response states 'You confirmed your app never calls BGTaskScheduler, so the fix is straightforward: remove the unused background mode entry' and explains root cause clearly

expectations.text: Shows the exact XML line to remove or edit in Info.plist
expectations.evidence: Response shows the UIBackgroundModes XML block with the processing entry and instructs to remove <string>processing</string>

expectations.text: Does NOT suggest adding BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers as the fix (that would be wrong for an app that doesn't use it)
expectations.evidence: Response only mentions BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers in the 'IF YOU NEED PROCESSING LATER' section as a future note, not as the primary fix. Primary fix is removal.
